<!-- indicator: fig-access-to-primary-care -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-access-to-primary-care
#| fig-cap: 'Percentage of Adults Who Have a Regular Health Care Provider, 2016, 2018, and 2021'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Percentage of Adults Who Have a Regular Health Care Provider, 2016, 2018, and 2021.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-access-to-primary-care", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
from IPython.display import Markdown, display
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_source_callout_for_object
display(Markdown(render_source_callout_for_object("fig-access-to-primary-care", CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)))
```
